examples: Mycologist plays a key role in the collaboration of clinical and laboratory works.
She spent her summers in Scotland and the Lake District, where her close observation of nature led her to become an expert on fungi or "mycologist."
Paul Cannon knows more than most, he's a British taxonomic mycologist, rarer now than many of the species he studies.
There are probably more fungi than there are other organisms put together and yet in Wales we have one professional mycologist.
